name: Texas Wedge
about: Texas Wedge is Lubbock's Indoor Golf Lounge, offering a premium indoor golf experience with private bays, a full-service bar, and TrackMan simulators. The venue is designed for golfers, groups, and events, providing a modern environment to play famous courses, practice with tour-level technology, and enjoy drinks served directly to your bay. Pricing is based on a per-bay hourly rate, and no membership is required, making it accessible for casual play, serious practice, and group events of all sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology provides tour-level accuracy and trusted by 1,000 PGA Tour players
Full-service bar with craft cocktails and drafts served directly to your bay
Over 450+ famous golf courses available to play, regardless of weather
Private bays offer a no-pressure environment for play and practice
On-site coaching available for personalized game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: You are allowed to bring in your own food
Full-service bar serving craft cocktails, drafts, and specialty flights

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitors trusted by professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for equipment details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring in your own food. The venue also has a full-service bar serving craft cocktails, drafts, and specialty flights.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for playing 18 holes. The booking system is based on hourly bay rentals, and time can be extended on the spot if available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if children are welcome or if there are kid-specific activities. It is best to contact the venue directly for family-related inquiries.
